JJ McCauley - Full Stack Developer

About Me

I'm a recent Computer Science (AI & Software Engineering focus) and Data Science grad who loves building things. I'm a fast, curiosity-driven programmer who takes ownership of my work and genuinely enjoys the process of creating.

I proudly describe myself as a nerd for this stuff. I spend my free time learning new technologies and am always looking to learn. Beyond SWE, I love Slay the Spire, I love dogs (despite being allergic ☹️), and commonly listen to rock/metal. I also have a weird tradition that I beat a Sega Genesis game called 'Shining Force' every year.

Feel free to send me an email or connect on LinkedIn if you want to chat or collaborate on something cool! I am always looking to meet more nerds like myself!
